<div class="thumb tright"><div class="thumbinner" style="width:148px;">[[File:NinjaTaros.PNG|The 4 popular NinjaTaro versions in game.]] <div class="thumbcaption"><div class="magnify" style="float:right"><a href="/wiki/index.php/Image_NinjaTaros.PNG/"><img alt="" src="/wiki/skins/common/images/magnify-clip.png"/></a></div>The 4 popular NinjaTaro versions in game.</div></div></div>

'''NinjaTaro''' is one of the most popular and common used Skins. It was originally created by Mortis in 2 variations - NinjaTaro and NinjaTaroDark. NinjaTaroDarkB was the third modification of it. A while later [[Raziel]] edited the original Skin into another popular version - Yodataroraz, which was made color friendly more than 3 years later by SorZ. Skin is still being edited often today and there exists a lot of modified versions which are not worth of mentioning because nobody is using them.

== Versions ==
=== NinjaTaro ===
[[File:NinjaTaro.PNG]]

'''NinjaTaro''' is a first edition of this ninja themed skin, made by Mortis. Although it is one of the most used Skins, some people blame it for a bit poor aiming animation - you can see where player is aiming only by movement of eyes, which is identical in few different frames of the skin.

=== NinjaTaroDark (NinjaTaroDarkA) ===
[[File:NinjaTaroDark.PNG]]

'''NinjaTaroDark''' is a second version of NinjaTaro, made by Mortis. It differs from NinjaTaro in color of the face and eyes. NinjaTaroDarkA is just another name for this Skin. Sometime while creating a new LieroX pack somebody added "A" to the Skin's name and caused a duplication. Most of the LieroX players now have this Skin under both names.

=== NinjaTaroDarkB ===
[[File:NinjaTaroDarkB.PNG]]

'''NinjaTaroDarkB''' is a third version of NinjaTaro which is practically identical to NinjaTaroDark, the only difference is in eyes - this one has red eyes. It was made by unknown artist as a slight edit of NinjaTaroDark. Some people claim it might belong to the original creator - Mortis, but this can not be confirmed.

=== Yodataroraz ===
[[File:Yodataroraz.PNG]]

'''Yodataroraz''' is a modification of NinjaTaro made by [[Raziel]] in late 2004. Skin is associated with Yoda character from Star Wars. In January 2008 SorZ made modifications of Yodataroraz with Raziel's permission. He edited the skin to a color change friendly one and also made 2 variations as they can be found in original NinjaTaro Skin - YodaTaroDarkA, YodaTaroDarkB.

== Remakes ==
=== NinjaTaro(Remade) ===
[[File:NinjaTaroRemade.png]]

'''NinjaTaro(Remade)''' was created from scratch by [[User Asrack|Asrack]] on April 30th to make a new smoother looking NinjaTaro. It is colour friendly, and works the same way as the original Ninja Taro - it is aiming with eyes. It differs from Mortis' NinjaTaro in smoothness which made it look more pixelated, and the hands and legs are more realistic.

[[Category:Skins]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721164625/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/NinjaTaro -->
